page.content: In FY2023, Ping An Insurance reported Life Insurance Metrics with Total Premiums at $1.2M, Claims Paid of $900M, a Persistency Rate of 75%, and New Policies Issued totaling 150,000. The Policyholder Insights revealed an Average Policy Size of $500,000, Average Duration of 10 Years, a Lapse Rate of 6.5%, and Customer Satisfaction at 15.3%. Revenue (INR) reached $3,200,000, with a Net Income of $1,500,000, CAPEX of $200M, Operating Profit amounting to $1,800M, and Investment Income at $300M. The Claims Ratio stood at 6.0%, while the Expense Ratio was noted at 8.0%. The Return on Equity was reported at 18.0%, and the Solvency Ratio was 20.0%. Additionally, the Underwriting Metrics for 2023 included a Total Revenue of ₹120B, Claims Paid at ₹70B, and Net Income of ₹23B, reflecting a Loss Ratio of 60% and an Expense Ratio of 15%.

page.content: The Combined Ratio was calculated at 75%, with an Underwriting Profit of ₹30B and a Return on Equity of 12%. The Policyholder Surplus was ₹25B, Total Assets reached ₹500B, and Total Liabilities were ₹450B. Net Written Premiums were at ₹100B, Reinsurance Costs totaled ₹15B, Reserve Requirements were ₹20B, and the Liquidity Ratio was 1.5.
